title: Zed + Gemma-4 12B & Qwen-3.6: HOW IS THIS POSSIBLE?! THIS IS CRAZY!
summary: Zed editor now supports local AI models through LM Studio, Ollama, and llama.cpp, enabling users to run coding assistants on-device without relying on cloud APIs. The integration supports models like Gemma-4 12B and Qwen and allows switching between local and cloud providers based on task requirements.
